description: Use this API to run probabilistic reliability assessment for transmission systems. Probabilistic indices on system problems are calculated in entire system or a given subsystem, these problems include flow overloading, voltage violation and loss of load, etc. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.2.0. ierr = relind_2(optrel, relrel, chaarg, accfile, dfxfile, prbfile, stsfile)
python_syntax: ierr = relind_2(optrel, relrel, chaarg, accfile, dfxfile, prbfile, stsfile)

parameters.name: optrel
parameters.description: An array of 8 elements specifying output options. (input).

parameters.name: relrel
parameters.description: An array of 3 elements specifying reliability assessment parameters. (input).

parameters.name: chaarg
parameters.description: Name of the study subsystem (blank by default, probabilistic reliability assessment is carried out in entire system). (input).

parameters.name: prbfile
parameters.description: Outage statistics data file (blank for none if options(1) is between 1 and 6, inclusive; no default allowed if options(1) is greater). (input).

parameters.name: stsfile
parameters.description: Output outage statistics data file (blank for none if options(6) is zero or options(1) is from 1 to 6; otherwise no default allowed). (input).

optrel.description: rating set (rating set program option setting by default).
include ties from study subsystem (0 by default).
output Outage Statistics Data File (0 by default).

relrel.description: percent of rating set, (>=0 and <=200.0, 100.0 by default).

error_codes.description: no contingency solution output file specified.
no outage statistic data file specified.
no output outage statistic data file specified.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
subsystem not found in DFAX data file.
contingency solution output file is not created by Multiple Level Contingency Analysis of PSSE 31 or later.
case data is not the one used in contingency analysis.
DFAX data file is not the one used in contingency analysis.
error reading contingency solution output file.
error opening contingency solution output file.
error opening outage statistic data file.
error opening output outage statistic data file.
prerequisite requirements for function not met.
